description: Kameleo Local API navigator: current endpoints and SDK usage from live docs, the fingerprint → profile → start flow, connecting Playwright/Puppeteer to a started profile over CDP, and profile/fingerprint configuration. Includes /kameleo:check and a Kameleo-keyword reminder hook. Defers general third-party doc verification to api-docs-first.
